hooks.command: /bin/sh -c 'root="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; if [ -z "$root" ]; then script=$(find "$HOME/.codex/plugins/cache" -path "*/powermem-codex-plugin/*/hooks/run-hook.sh" -type f 2>/dev/null | sort | tail -n 1); root=${script%/hooks/run-hook.sh}; fi; [ -n "$root" ] || exit 0; exec /bin/sh "$root/hooks/run-hook.sh"'

/bin/sh -c 'root="${PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}"; if [ -z "$root" ]; then script=$(find "$HOME/.codex/plugins/cache" -path "*/powermem-codex-plugin/*/hooks/run-hook.sh" -type f 2>/dev/null | sort | tail -n 1); root=${script%/hooks/run-hook.sh}; fi; [ -n "$root" ] || exit 0; exec /bin/sh "$root/hooks/run-hook.sh"'
